# S. Kumar Creation Pvt Ltd (SKCPL)

S. Kumar Creation Pvt Ltd (SKCPL) is a total turnkey solution provider in Telecom, Infrastructure, Real Estate & Hospitality located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India. With over 16 years of excellence, SKCPL handles telecom tower installations, smart city projects, real estate construction, and manages the Fun N Food Resort in Indore.

## Contact Information
Address: 45, Maa Sharda Nagar, Kabit Khedi, MR-10, Indore, Madhya Pradesh – 452010
Phone: 0731-4938668
